solutions.title: Fix file permissions (Linux/macOS)
steps: chmod +x script.sh  — add execute permission
sudo command     — run with elevated privileges if needed
chown user:group file  — change ownership
steps_zh: chmod +x script.sh ——添加执行权限
sudo command ——必要时以提升的权限运行
chown user:group 文件 ——更改所有者

solutions.title: Fix file permissions (Windows)
steps: Run terminal as Administrator
Check if file is locked by another process (Task Manager → Details)
Check antivirus/quarantine blocking the execution
steps_zh: 以管理员身份运行终端
检查是否 file is locked by another process (Task Manager → Details)
检查杀毒软件/隔离区是否阻止了执行

solutions_zh.title: 修正文件权限 (Linux/macOS)
steps: chmod +x script.sh ——添加执行权限
sudo command ——必要时以提升的权限运行
chown user:group file ——更改所有者

solutions_zh.title: 修正文件权限 (Windows)
steps: 以管理员身份运行终端
检查文件是否被其他进程锁定（任务管理器 → 详细信息）
检查杀毒软件/隔离区是否阻止了执行

title: OutOfMemoryError / OOM killed / heap out of memory

solutions.title: Increase memory limit
steps: Node.js: NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=4096' node app.js (4GB)
Java: -Xmx4g flag to set max heap to 4GB
Python: usually means infinite recursion or massive data structure — fix the code
steps_zh: Node.js：NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=4096' node app.js（4GB）
Java：-Xmx4g 标志设置最大堆内存为 4GB
Python：通常意味着无限递归或数据结构过大——修复代码

solutions.title: Find the memory leak
steps: Are you storing data in a list/dict that grows unboundedly?
Infinite loop appending to a collection?
Use profiler: node --inspect, Java VisualVM, Python memory_profiler
steps_zh: 是否在不断向列表/字典中无限制地添加数据？
是否无限循环向集合追加数据？
使用 profiler：node --inspect, Java VisualVM, Python memory_profiler

title_zh: 内存溢出 / OOM 被杀死 / 堆内存不足

solutions_zh.title: 增加内存限制
steps: Node.js: NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=4096' node app.js (4GB)
Java: -Xmx4g 设置最大堆为 4GB
Python: 通常意味着无限递归或巨大数据结构——修复代码

solutions_zh.title: 查找内存泄漏
steps: 你是否在列表/字典中无限增长地存储数据？
无限循环向集合中追加数据？
使用分析器: node --inspect、Java VisualVM、Python memory_profiler

title: Connection timeout / ETIMEDOUT / request aborted

solutions.title: Check network and target
steps: Target server is not responding — is it up? Try curl/ping first
DNS issue? Check /etc/hosts or nslookup for the hostname
Firewall blocking the port? Check iptables/Windows Firewall settings
steps_zh: 目标服务器无响应——它在运行吗？先尝试 curl/ping
DNS 问题？检查 /etc/hosts 或用 nslookup 查主机名
防火墙阻止了端口？检查 iptables/Windows 防火墙设置

solutions.title: Increase timeout or retry
steps: Increase connection timeout in your HTTP client config
Implement retry logic with exponential backoff
For API calls: check rate limits — you may be throttled
steps_zh: 增加 connection timeout in your HTTP client config
实现带指数退避的重试逻辑
对于 API 调用：检查速率限制——你可能被限流了

title_zh: 连接超时 / ETIMEDOUT / 请求被中止

solutions_zh.title: 检查网络和目标
steps: 目标服务器没有响应——它是否在运行？先用 curl/ping 测试
DNS 问题？检查 /etc/hosts 或 nslookup 域名
防火墙阻塞端口？检查 iptables/Windows 防火墙规则

solutions_zh.title: 增加超时或添加重试
steps: 在 HTTP 客户端配置中增加连接超时
实现带指数退避的重试逻辑
API 调用: 检查速率限制——你可能被限流了

title: Git: Merge Conflict

solutions.title: Resolve git merge conflicts
steps: Manually edit the conflicting files — look for <<<<<<<, =======, >>>>>>> markers
Choose which changes to keep, remove the markers, save the file
git add <resolved-file> to mark as resolved
git merge --continue or git commit to finish
Use tools: VS Code merge editor, git mergetool, or GitHub's conflict resolver
solutions.title_zh: 解决 git 合并冲突
steps_zh: 选择 which changes to keep, remove the markers, save the file
git add <已解决的文件> 标记为已解决
git merge --continue 或 git commit 完成
使用 tools：VS Code merge editor, git mergetool, or GitHub's conflict resolver

solutions_zh.title: 解决 Git 合并冲突
steps: 选择保留哪些修改，移除标记，保存文件
git add <resolved-file> 标记已解决
git merge --continue 或 git commit 完成
使用工具: VS Code 合并编辑器、git mergetool 或 GitHub 冲突解决器

code_fix:
# Conflict markers in file:
# <<<<<<< HEAD
# your changes
# =======
# their changes
# >>>>>>> branch-name

# After resolving:
git add file.txt
git merge --continue

title: Shell: Command Not Found
patterns: not recognized as an internal or external command

solutions.title: Install or fix PATH
steps: The command is not installed or not in your PATH
Install it: apt-get install <cmd>, brew install <cmd>, or pip install <cmd>
Check PATH: echo $PATH (Linux/macOS) or echo %PATH% (Windows)
Maybe you need ./script.sh instead of script.sh for local scripts
steps_zh: 命令未安装或不在 PATH 中
安装：apt-get install <命令>, brew install <命令>, 或 pip install <命令>
检查 PATH：echo $PATH (Linux/macOS) or echo %PATH% (Windows)
本地脚本可能需要 ./script.sh 而非 script.sh

solutions_zh.title: 安装或修复 PATH
steps: 命令未安装或不在 PATH 中
安装: apt-get install <cmd>, brew install <cmd>, 或 pip install <cmd>
检查 PATH: echo $PATH (Linux/macOS) 或 echo %PATH% (Windows)
本地脚本可能需要用 ./script.sh 而非 script.sh

code_fix:
# ❌ Error
some-unknown-cmd

# ✅ Fix
which some-command   # Check if installed
apt-get install some-command  # Install if missing

title: Disk Full / ENOSPC (No Space Left)
title_zh: 磁盘满 / 无剩余空间

solutions.title: Free up disk space
steps: Check space: df -h (Linux/macOS) or Get-PSDrive (Windows)
Find large dirs: du -sh /* | sort -h (Linux) or diruse
Delete old logs: /var/log/*.log, npm cache clean --force, docker system prune
Clean package managers: apt clean, brew cleanup, pip cache purge
steps_zh: 检查 space：df -h (Linux/macOS) or Get-PSDrive (Windows)
查找大目录：du -sh /* | sort -h（Linux）或 diruse
删除 old logs: /var/log/*.log, npm cache clean --force, docker system prune
清理包管理器：apt clean、brew cleanup、pip cache purge

solutions_zh.title: 释放磁盘空间
steps: 检查空间: df -h (Linux/macOS) 或 Get-PSDrive (Windows)
查找大目录: du -sh /* | sort -h (Linux) 或 diruse
删除旧日志: /var/log/*.log, npm cache clean --force, docker system prune
清理包管理器: apt clean, brew cleanup, pip cache purge

code_fix:
# Linux: find largest directories
du -sh /* 2>/dev/null | sort -h | tail -20
# Clean docker
docker system prune -a --volumes

title: Address Already in Use (EADDRINUSE)

solutions.title: Free or change the port
steps: Another process is already listening on that port
Find: lsof -i :3000 (Linux/macOS) or netstat -ano | findstr :3000 (Windows)
Kill the process: kill -9 <PID> (Linux) or taskkill /F /PID <PID> (Windows)
Or change port: usually via --port or PORT env var
steps_zh: 另一进程已在监听该端口
查找：lsof -i :3000 (Linux/macOS) or netstat -ano | findstr :3000 (Windows)
终止 the process：kill -9 <PID> (Linux) or taskkill /F /PID <PID> (Windows)
或 change port: usually via --port or PORT env var

solutions_zh.title: 释放或更换端口
steps: 另一个进程已在监听该端口
查找: lsof -i :3000 (Linux/macOS) 或 netstat -ano | findstr :3000 (Windows)
杀死进程: kill -9 <PID> (Linux) 或 taskkill /F /PID <PID> (Windows)
或更换端口: 通常通过 --port 或 PORT 环境变量

code_fix:
# Linux: find and kill process on port 3000
lsof -ti :3000 | xargs kill -9

# Or change port
PORT=3001 node server.js

title: SSL/TLS Certificate Error

solutions.title: Check certificate validity
steps: The SSL certificate is expired, self-signed, or misconfigured
Check: curl -vI https://example.com (look for 'expire')
Dev: set NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=0 (temporary, not for production)
Python: requests.get(url, verify=False) or verify='/path/to/cert.pem'
Production: renew with Let's Encrypt or fix CA chain
steps_zh: SSL 证书已过期、自签名或配置错误
检查：curl -vI https://example.com（查找 'expire'）
开发环境：设置 NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=0（临时，不要用于生产）
Python：requests.get(url, verify=False) 或 verify='/path/to/cert.pem'
生产环境：用 Let's Encrypt 续期或修复 CA 链

solutions_zh.title: 检查证书有效性
steps: SSL 证书已过期、自签名或配置有误
检查: curl -vI https://example.com (查看 'expire')
开发: 设置 NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=0 (临时，勿用于生产)
Python: requests.get(url, verify=False) 或 verify='/path/to/cert.pem'
生产: 用 Let's Encrypt 续期或修复 CA 链

code_fix:
# Check cert expiry
openssl s_client -connect example.com:443 -servername example.com </dev/null 2>/dev/null | openssl x509 -noout -dates

title: Environment Variable Not Set

solutions.title: Set the missing environment variable
steps: Export the variable: export API_KEY=xxx (Linux/macOS) or set API_KEY=xxx (Windows)
Use a .env file with python-dotenv or dotenv for Node.js
Check for typos in variable name
Use os.getenv('KEY', 'default') instead of os.environ['KEY'] to avoid KeyError
steps_zh: 导出变量：export API_KEY=xxx（Linux/macOS）或 set API_KEY=xxx（Windows）
对 Node.js 使用 a .env file with python-dotenv or dotenv
检查变量名是否有拼写错误
使用 os.getenv('KEY', 'default') 代替 os.environ['KEY'] to avoid KeyError

solutions_zh.title: 设置缺失的环境变量
steps: 设置变量: export API_KEY=xxx (Linux/macOS) 或 set API_KEY=xxx (Windows)
使用 python-dotenv 或 Node.js dotenv 加载 .env 文件
检查变量名拼写
用 os.getenv('KEY', 'default') 代替 os.environ['KEY'] 避免 KeyError

code_fix:
# ❌ Error
import os
key = os.environ['API_KEY']  # KeyError if not set

# ✅ Fix
key = os.getenv('API_KEY', 'dev-key-12345')  # fallback value

title: Matplotlib: Backend / GUI Error
title_zh: Matplotlib: 后端 / GUI 错误
patterns: UserWarning: Matplotlib is currently using agg

solutions.title: Set correct backend
steps: Agg backend is for file-only rendering (no GUI)
Install a GUI backend: pip install pyqt5, then: matplotlib.use('Qt5Agg')
In Jupyter: %matplotlib inline
In a script with no display: use plt.savefig('plot.png') instead of plt.show()
steps_zh: Agg 后端仅用于文件渲染（无 GUI）
安装 GUI 后端：pip install pyqt5，然后：matplotlib.use('Qt5Agg')
在 Jupyter 中：%matplotlib inline
在无显示器的脚本中：使用 plt.savefig('plot.png') 代替 plt.show()

solutions_zh.title: 设置正确的后端
steps: Agg 后端仅用于文件渲染（无 GUI）
安装 GUI 后端: pip install pyqt5，然后 matplotlib.use('Qt5Agg')
Jupyter 中: %matplotlib inline
无显示器的服务器脚本: 用 plt.savefig('plot.png') 代替 plt.show()

code_fix:
# For headless/server use
import matplotlib
matplotlib.use('Agg')  # Non-GUI backend
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
plt.plot([1,2,3])
plt.savefig('output.png')  # Save instead of show
